title: crinum asiaticum var. pedunculatum
intro: Crinum asiaticum var. pedunculatum, also known as the Asiatic Crinum or Pedunculate Crinum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anthelmintic, antispasmodic, and diuretic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Crinum asiaticum var. pedunculatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as a natural remedy for snake bites and other poisonous bites. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal properties, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
